summary: Evaluator verified all 29 manifest hashes, line-level reviewed env.ts/server.ts/index.ts (strict names-only zod schema, exactly 3 tools, no exec/spawn/eval/fs-write surface), independently re-ran the 19 T-002 tests (19/19) and typecheck (exit 0), validated against the real repo contract (8-field osInfoData, 14-name cliName enum), and confirmed genuine red->green (compile-fail exit 2 -> 38 pass). Verdict PASS with two Minor, non-blocking observations.

findings.description: Verification-hygiene drift: the gate-time tests.log (50 tests incl. T-003/T-004 surfaces) and manifest index.ts (imports T-003 diagnostics.js) show the gate ran over the fully-built feature tree, not a T-002-isolated state; git history confirms the T-002-only index.ts blob and that the later diff only swapped stderr logging. Evidence contamination, not faked completion.
AC-002 missing-CLI test hedges (pathOverride prepends rather than isolates PATH), asserting the weaker invariant instead of a pinned available:false.

note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
